args.Description: "Replace hardcoded 'Term 1' with dynamic Academic Year dropdown and filter classes list based on selected academic year."
args.Instruction: "Add `selAcademicYear` state, update the `useEffect` fetch to initialize it and choose the correct default class, extract `academicYears` list, filter classes by the selected academic year, and replace the hardcoded GhostBtn with a styled select dropdown for academic years."
